vocab.meaning: ốc đảo bình yên (giữa nơi ồn ào)
vocab.example: I’ve discovered a small library in the city center that acts as a tranquil oasis away from the weekend traffic.

vocab.meaning: âm thanh hỗn tạp, chói tai
vocab.example: I generally avoid the downtown area on Saturdays because the constant cacophony of car horns and construction is exhausting.

vocab.meaning: không gian/bầu không khí thanh bình
vocab.example: I’m much more inclined to visit a lakeside cafe where the serene ambiance helps me clear my head.

vocab.meaning: năng lượng cao, mạnh mẽ, sôi động
vocab.example: While my friends enjoy high-octane environments like crowded sports bars, I find them a bit overstimulating.

vocab.meaning: nơi trú ẩn, nơi tôn nghiêm/yên tĩnh
vocab.example: After a grueling work week, my garden serves as a private sanctuary where silence is the only rule.

vocab.meaning: tiếng gầm rú/tiếng ồn đinh tai nhức óc
vocab.example: The deafening roar of the crowd at the stadium is exciting for some, but I prefer the whispers of a gallery.

vocab.meaning: người tìm kiếm sự biệt lập/tĩnh lặng
vocab.example: Being a bit of a solitude-seeker, I usually spend my Sundays hiking in the less-traveled parts of the forest.

vocab.meaning: sự hối hả và nhộn nhịp
vocab.example: I try to steer clear of the hustle and bustle of shopping malls when I’m supposed to be relaxing.

vocab.meaning: sự bình yên và tĩnh lặng
vocab.example: All I really want on a Sunday afternoon is some peace and quiet to catch up on my reading.

vocab.meaning: bầu không khí sôi nổi, đầy sức sống
vocab.example: On rare occasions, I do appreciate the vibrant atmosphere of a local festival where the energy is contagious.
